description: PhantomKernel OS Software Bill of Materials

dependencies.name: anyhow
dependencies.description: Flexible concrete Error type built on std::error::Error

dependencies.name: bitflags
dependencies.description: A macro to generate structures which behave like bitflags.

dependencies.name: block-buffer
dependencies.description: Buffer type for block processing of data

dependencies.name: cfg-if
dependencies.description:
A macro to ergonomically define an item depending on a large number of #[cfg]
parameters. Structured like an if-else chain, the first matching branch is the
item that gets emitted.

dependencies.name: cpufeatures
dependencies.description:
Lightweight runtime CPU feature detection for aarch64, loongarch64, and x86/x86_64 targets, 
with no_std support and support for mobile targets including Android and iOS

dependencies.name: crypto-common
dependencies.description: Common cryptographic traits

dependencies.name: digest
dependencies.description: Traits for cryptographic hash functions and message authentication codes

dependencies.name: dyn-clone
dependencies.description: Clone trait that is dyn-compatible

dependencies.name: equivalent
dependencies.description: Traits for key comparison in maps.

dependencies.name: errno
dependencies.description: Cross-platform interface to the `errno` variable.

dependencies.name: fastrand
dependencies.description: A simple and fast random number generator

dependencies.name: foldhash
dependencies.description: A fast, non-cryptographic, minimally DoS-resistant hashing algorithm.

dependencies.name: generic-array
dependencies.description: Generic types implementing functionality of arrays

dependencies.name: getrandom
dependencies.description: A small cross-platform library for retrieving random data from system source

dependencies.name: gk-privexec
dependencies.description: Privileged execution controls for PhantomKernel OS

dependencies.name: hashbrown
dependencies.description: A Rust port of Google's SwissTable hash map

dependencies.name: hashbrown
dependencies.description: A Rust port of Google's SwissTable hash map

dependencies.name: heck
dependencies.description: heck is a case conversion library.

dependencies.name: hmac
dependencies.description: Generic implementation of Hash-based Message Authentication Code (HMAC)

dependencies.name: id-arena
dependencies.description: A simple, id-based arena.

dependencies.name: indexmap
dependencies.description: A hash table with consistent order and fast iteration.

dependencies.name: itoa
dependencies.description: Fast integer primitive to string conversion

dependencies.name: leb128fmt
dependencies.description: A library to encode and decode LEB128 compressed integers.

dependencies.name: libc
dependencies.description: Raw FFI bindings to platform libraries like libc.

dependencies.name: linux-raw-sys
dependencies.license: Apache-2.0 WITH LLVM-exception OR Apache-2.0 OR MIT
dependencies.description: Generated bindings for Linux's userspace API

dependencies.name: log
dependencies.description: A lightweight logging facade for Rust

dependencies.name: memchr
dependencies.description:
Provides extremely fast (uses SIMD on x86_64, aarch64 and wasm32) routines for
1, 2 or 3 byte search and single substring search.

dependencies.name: once_cell
dependencies.description: Single assignment cells and lazy values.

dependencies.name: prettyplease
dependencies.description: A minimal `syn` syntax tree pretty-printer

dependencies.name: proc-macro2
dependencies.description: A substitute implementation of the compiler's `proc_macro` API to decouple token-based libraries from the procedural macro use case.

dependencies.name: quote
dependencies.description: Quasi-quoting macro quote!(...)

dependencies.name: r-efi
dependencies.description: UEFI Reference Specification Protocol Constants and Definitions

dependencies.name: rustix
dependencies.license: Apache-2.0 WITH LLVM-exception OR Apache-2.0 OR MIT
dependencies.description: Safe Rust bindings to POSIX/Unix/Linux/Winsock-like syscalls

dependencies.name: schemars
dependencies.description: Generate JSON Schemas from Rust code

dependencies.name: schemars_derive
dependencies.description: Macros for #[derive(JsonSchema)], for use with schemars

dependencies.name: semver
dependencies.description: Parser and evaluator for Cargo's flavor of Semantic Versioning

dependencies.name: serde
dependencies.description: A generic serialization/deserialization framework

dependencies.name: serde_core
dependencies.description: Serde traits only, with no support for derive -- use the `serde` crate instead

dependencies.name: serde_derive
dependencies.description: Macros 1.1 implementation of #[derive(Serialize, Deserialize)]

dependencies.name: serde_derive_internals
dependencies.description: AST representation used by Serde derive macros. Unstable.

dependencies.name: serde_json
dependencies.description: A JSON serialization file format

dependencies.name: serde_spanned
dependencies.description: Serde-compatible spanned Value

dependencies.name: sha2
dependencies.description:
Pure Rust implementation of the SHA-2 hash function family
including SHA-224, SHA-256, SHA-384, and SHA-512.

dependencies.name: subtle
dependencies.description: Pure-Rust traits and utilities for constant-time cryptographic implementations.

dependencies.name: syn
dependencies.description: Parser for Rust source code

dependencies.name: tempfile
dependencies.description: A library for managing temporary files and directories.

dependencies.name: thiserror
dependencies.description: derive(Error)

dependencies.name: thiserror-impl
dependencies.description: Implementation detail of the `thiserror` crate

dependencies.name: toml
dependencies.description:
A native Rust encoder and decoder of TOML-formatted files and streams. Provides
implementations of the standard Serialize/Deserialize traits for TOML data to
facilitate deserializing and serializing Rust structures.

dependencies.name: toml_datetime
dependencies.description: A TOML-compatible datetime type

dependencies.name: toml_edit
dependencies.description: Yet another format-preserving TOML parser.

dependencies.name: toml_write
dependencies.description: A low-level interface for writing out TOML

dependencies.name: typenum
dependencies.description:
Typenum is a Rust library for type-level numbers evaluated at
    compile time. It currently supports bits, unsigned integers, and signed
    integers. It also provides a type-level array of type-level numbers, but its
    implementation is incomplete.

dependencies.name: unicode-ident
dependencies.description: Determine whether characters have the XID_Start or XID_Continue properties according to Unicode Standard Annex #31

dependencies.name: unicode-xid
dependencies.description:
Determine whether characters have the XID_Start
or XID_Continue properties according to
Unicode Standard Annex #31.

dependencies.name: version_check
dependencies.description: Tiny crate to check the version of the installed/running rustc.

dependencies.description: WASIp2 API bindings for Rust

dependencies.description: WASIp3 API bindings for Rust

dependencies.description: A low-level WebAssembly encoder.

dependencies.name: wasm-metadata
dependencies.license: Apache-2.0 WITH LLVM-exception OR Apache-2.0 OR MIT
dependencies.description: Read and manipulate WebAssembly metadata

dependencies.name: wasmparser
dependencies.license: Apache-2.0 WITH LLVM-exception OR Apache-2.0 OR MIT
dependencies.description: A simple event-driven library for parsing WebAssembly binary files.

dependencies.name: windows-link
dependencies.description: Linking for Windows

dependencies.name: windows-sys
dependencies.description: Rust for Windows

dependencies.name: winnow
dependencies.description: A byte-oriented, zero-copy, parser combinators library

dependencies.name: wit-bindgen
dependencies.license: Apache-2.0 WITH LLVM-exception OR Apache-2.0 OR MIT
dependencies.description:
Rust bindings generator and runtime support for WIT and the component model.
Used when compiling Rust programs to the component model.

dependencies.name: wit-bindgen-core
dependencies.license: Apache-2.0 WITH LLVM-exception OR Apache-2.0 OR MIT
dependencies.description:
Low-level support for bindings generation based on WIT files for use with
`wit-bindgen-cli` and other languages.

dependencies.name: wit-bindgen-rust
dependencies.license: Apache-2.0 WITH LLVM-exception OR Apache-2.0 OR MIT
dependencies.description:
Rust bindings generator for WIT and the component model, typically used through
the `wit-bindgen` crate's `generate!` macro.

dependencies.name: wit-bindgen-rust-macro
dependencies.license: Apache-2.0 WITH LLVM-exception OR Apache-2.0 OR MIT
dependencies.description: Procedural macro paired with the `wit-bindgen` crate.

dependencies.name: wit-component
dependencies.license: Apache-2.0 WITH LLVM-exception OR Apache-2.0 OR MIT
dependencies.description: Tooling for working with `*.wit` and component files together.

dependencies.name: wit-parser
dependencies.license: Apache-2.0 WITH LLVM-exception OR Apache-2.0 OR MIT
dependencies.description: Tooling for parsing `*.wit` files and working with their contents.

dependencies.name: zmij
dependencies.description: A double-to-string conversion algorithm based on Schubfach and yy
